query: SELECT `id`, `name`, `description`, `cover_url`, `contact_id`, `category`, `language`, `publishing_frequency`, `rss_url`, `spotify_url`, `youtube_url`, `podcast_status`, `notes`, `createdAt`, `updatedAt` FROM `podcasts` ORDER BY `podcasts`.`createdAt` DESC LIMIT 5;
